instruction: Classify the player's support ticket into a category.
baseline_prompt: You are a game player-support assistant. Classify the player's support ticket into a category. Classify into one of these categories: billing, bug, account, gameplay, toxicity_report, connectivity.
source: Authored for TEI-Bench (Sonnet-generated, Sonnet-validated; kept only label-agreed examples).

train.query: The monthly subscription renewed automatically even though I cancelled it last week through the settings menu. I need this charge reversed immediately.
The character's health bar is displaying incorrectly - it shows I have full HP but my character dies from a single hit. I've tried restarting but the issue persists across multiple matches.

My username doesn't show up when I search for it anymore and I can't sign in. When I try the password recovery option, it says no profile exists with my email address, but I've been playing for three years. What happened to everything?
I don't understand the skill tree progression. If I spend points in the warrior branch, can I still unlock abilities from the mage path later, or am I locked into one class permanently?

I want to flag a user named PixelDestroyer for extreme verbal abuse. They spent an entire tournament qualifier match harassing a younger player, mocking them constantly and using very inappropriate language that no one should have to hear.

The latency in my matches is insane right now. Everyone else is moving smoothly but I'm rubber-banding all over the place and my actions are delayed by like 2-3 seconds. It wasn't like this yesterday and my ping to other servers is normal.
I bought the Deluxe Edition upgrade but my account is still showing as Standard. The $29.99 left my PayPal account but I didn't receive what I paid for.

During the final cutscene of Chapter 4, the audio completely desynchronizes from the video and then the game just kicks me back to the main menu without saving my progress. I've lost hours of gameplay because of this.

Hi, I think someone else has accessed my profile without permission. I noticed achievements unlocked and games played that I never touched. I want to enable two-factor authentication immediately and check if my email address was changed.
Is there a way to fast travel between different regions once you've discovered them, or do I need to walk back every time? I've explored about 60% of the map and backtracking takes forever.

Someone with the name WarriorKing2023 has been griefing and using racist language in every game I've played with them tonight. They're creating a really toxic environment and ruining matches for everyone involved.

The game was running perfectly until about an hour ago, now I'm experiencing massive frame drops and stuttering that only happens when I'm online. In offline mode everything is smooth, so it seems like a network problem.
My son made several in-game purchases without my permission totaling over $300. I need to request a chargeback for these unauthorized transactions made on March 15th.
When I equip the legendary sword I got from the boss fight, my inventory screen becomes unresponsive and I have to force quit the game. This happens every single time I try to use that specific item.

I've been trying to log in for the past hour but keep getting an 'invalid credentials' error even though I'm 100% sure my password is correct. I've tried resetting it twice already but the email isn't coming through. Can someone help me get back into my profile?

test.query: How does the reputation system affect merchant prices? I noticed some shopkeepers charge me way more than my friend pays, and we're both at the same level.

I was just in a match with username xXDarkLord99Xx who spent the entire game sending hateful slurs in chat and telling other players to harm themselves. This kind of harassment needs to be addressed immediately as it made the experience completely unpleasant for everyone.

I keep getting kicked out of matches every few minutes and it's making the game completely unplayable. My internet connection is fine with other games and apps, but this one just won't stay connected. This has been happening for the past three days.
Can I get a refund for the Season Pass? I purchased it thinking it would give me access to all future content but it only covers this season. I feel misled by the description.

The game suddenly started running at about 2 frames per second after the latest update, even though my system exceeds the recommended requirements. Before the patch everything was running smoothly at 60fps.

I'm locked out after too many failed login attempts, but it wasn't me trying to get in. I was asleep during that time. This looks like someone was trying to break into my profile. Can you unlock it and help me secure it better?
Can someone explain how the crafting system works? I have all these materials in my inventory but when I go to the workbench, half of the recipes are grayed out even though I meet the requirements.

The player NightShade47 was cheating and when called out, started attacking other players with homophobic slurs and personal insults. I've never experienced such aggressive behavior in this game before and I think their account should be reviewed.
Every time I try to join a game session, I sit in queue forever and then get a timeout error. My friends are all playing fine on the same region but I literally cannot connect to any match at all.
I accidentally purchased the Legendary Skin Bundle instead of the Standard one. Is it possible to reverse this transaction? I haven't used any of the items yet.

Every time I try to enter the dungeon on the northern map, my screen freezes for about 5 seconds and then the entire application closes itself. This has happened three times in a row now and I can't progress in the campaign.

I need to update the email address associated with my profile because I no longer have access to my old university email that's about to be deactivated. How do I change it without losing access to everything I've purchased and earned?
What's the best strategy for defeating the fire dragon boss? I've tried attacking from range but my arrows barely do any damage, and when I get close it one-shots me with its breath attack.

I need to report inappropriate conduct from a user called PhoenixRising. They were intentionally throwing the game while verbally abusing the rest of the team with sexist comments. Multiple people on our team asked them to stop but it continued throughout the entire session.

My character keeps freezing in place for several seconds at a time, then suddenly teleports forward. Other players seem to be experiencing the same issue based on their movement patterns. Is there something wrong with the server performance right now?
I was charged twice for the same premium currency pack yesterday. My bank statement shows two transactions of $49.99 but I only received 5000 gems once. Can you help me get my money back?

My character model is stuck in a falling animation even when standing on solid ground. I can still move around but the animation won't change and it's making the game really difficult to play. Reloading my save didn't fix it.

The authentication code from my authenticator app isn't working anymore. I got a new phone last week and forgot to transfer the settings before wiping my old device. Now I can't access anything. Is there a way to verify my identity another way?
